name: Bomberman
description: Hudson Soft's maze-action franchise built around bombs, destructible blocks, power-ups, and multiplayer chaos.

eras.title: Hudson Classic Era
eras.description: Original maze-action formula and early console multiplayer identity.

eras.title: Party Multiplayer Era
eras.description: Super Bomberman, Saturn Bomberman, and the franchise's peak as a local multiplayer staple.

eras.title: Konami Legacy Era
eras.description: Post-Hudson period under Konami, focused on revivals and legacy releases.
